info.longBusinessSummary: Palantir Technologies Inc. operates in AI/defense.

sections.business: Item 1. Business. Palantir Technologies Inc. was founded by our founder to build AI/defense technology. Our founder continues to lead the company. We develop and sell products that we believe create a durable competitive moat. Item 1A. Risk Factors.
sections.risk_factors: Item 1A. Risk Factors. We have a history of operating losses and may not achieve profitability. Our business depends on the continued growth of the AI/defense market, which is uncertain and subject to regulation and regulatory scrutiny. We rely on a limited number of customers and a significant portion of our revenue is concentrated. The loss of our chief executive officer or other key personnel could harm our business. We face intense competition and rapid technological change. Compliance with evolving regulation may increase costs. Item 2. Properties.
sections.mdna: Management's Discussion. Revenue grew driven by demand.
